comments.author: @seanconroy7222
comments.text: Most of the places you featured are not in Ireland.

replies.author: @travellifestyletv
replies.text: Hi there, thank you for watching. However, we would like to politely clarify: all the highlighted locations mentioned in the content (such as the Newgrange complex, the Burren, Skellig Michael, the Aran Islands, the Cliffs of Moher, Croagh Patrick, and Connemara) are indeed located within the Republic of Ireland. It is possible that some of the illustrative B-roll footage caused a misunderstanding. Could you point out the specific timestamps that raised your concern so we can double-check the visuals? Thank you!

comments.text: This is nice to see and hear easily understood by everyone. ❤

replies.author: @travellifestyletv
replies.text: Thank you so much! ❤️ We are thrilled that you enjoyed the video and found the information about Ireland's culture and history accessible. Your support means a lot to our channel!

comments.author: @lizbitclark9778
comments.text: I'm sad yall used ai, I would've been interested in learning and watching, but the ai ruins it.

replies.author: @travellifestyletv
replies.text: Hi there, thank you for your honest feedback. We completely understand and respect your perspective regarding the use of AI. While we do use technology to assist in production, the script, research, and historical-cultural facts about Ireland are carefully curated with genuine passion. We are sorry the experience wasn't up to your expectations this time, and we wish you the best in finding content that better suits your preferences!

replies.author: @travellifestyletv
replies.text: Thank you for the detailed feedback! We acknowledge this technical issue and sincerely apologize that the audio balance affected your viewing experience. Your input is very helpful, and we will definitely adjust the volume levels between the background music and the voiceover in our upcoming videos.
